issues: Melody measures have incorrect durations for 6/8 time signature (most measures are 2-4 beats instead of 6)
Climax section uses ascending scale run which feels mechanical rather than melodic
Chord voicings are consistently in root position, lacks textural variety
6/8 feel not strongly established; rhythm parts have measure duration issues
Fiddle melody could use more folk/celtic ornamentation characteristic of the style
All instruments playing similar rhythmic density, lacks textural contrast
Bass part is very simple root notes only
summary: Solid direction sample with good harmonic foundation and clear folk/celtic character. Main issues are technical (measure durations) and could benefit from more stylistic ornamentation and textural variety. Melody shows good contour but needs stronger 6/8 rhythmic feel.
